description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the miktex/miktex Docker image and defines a single build stage named compile-pdfs. In the compile-pdfs job, run a before_script that moves all project files into /miktex/work, then execute the script commands: cd /miktex/work and bash compile.sh, and finally run an after_script that changes to /miktex/work and copies the Bin directory back to the project directory. The job should publish an artifact containing the Bin/ directory, retained for 60 days. No caches, services, or conditional rules are required.
